_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for nv-generate-mr-brain-finetune — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.DATALIST: <path to MONAI-style datalist JSON (non-empty training[] with relative image paths)>
vars.DATA_BASE_DIR: <directory used to resolve datalist image paths>
vars.PREFLIGHT: <'1' to validate + stage without GPU training, '' for a real finetune run>
